nodes.body: <<FILL role=setup words=110 beats='it is the morning of the Brookfield Invention Expo and Nadia arrives at the Maker Lab early with a box of pretzels for The Gadget Squad; the door hangs ajar though it is always locked overnight; on the bench her team robot Whirligig lies in pieces, panels off, wheels out, wiring unclipped, and her stomach drops as she steps inside'>>

choices.label: Look closer at the wrecked workbench.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=setup words=112 beats='her teammate Owen arrives and together they discover it is not just Whirligig; The Volt Squad found their robot Sparky taken apart and the Wrenches robot Nutmeg too; strangest of all nothing is broken or missing, screws are sorted into neat bins, wires are coiled like ribbon, and faint faint tread lines run across the floor; sabotage that tidies up after itself makes no sense at all'>>

choices.label: Take stock before the morning assembly.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=105 beats='ten minutes before the whole school gathers for assembly Nadia weighs where to look first: the strange sorted bins on the bench, the door and its lock that her teammate Owen swears was chained tight, or the knot of early kids in the hall who might have seen something last night; she can only manage one before the opening chime'>>

choices.label: Study the strange sorted bins.
Examine the workshop door and lock.
Ask the kids gathering in the hall.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='the bins are sorted by size and shape with masking tape labels in blocky stencil letters reading TINY and FLAT and BRIGHT; every last part of Whirligig is here, cleaned and grouped, as if someone meant to be helpful; Nadia frowns, because no thief sorts screws by length'>>

choices.label: Check the labels against everyone's handwriting.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=92 beats='the stencil letters match no kid and no teacher; the ink smells like a dusty old typewriter ribbon and one label sits slightly crooked, as if stamped on by a machine instead of a hand; the opening chime rings and Nadia pockets a sticker as evidence'>>

choices.label: Head to assembly with a sticker in her pocket.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='her teammate Owen swears the door was chained when he rattled it at seven; the lock shows no scratches, the window is latched from the inside, and the faint tread lines do not come in from the hallway at all; whatever made them started and ended somewhere inside the room'>>

choices.label: Follow the faint tread lines across the floor.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=92 beats='the faint tread lines run from bench to bench in patient tidy lines and vanish at the supply nook at the back of the workshop, the one place nobody has thought to check; the supply nook will have to wait, because the opening chime is ringing'>>

choices.label: Head to assembly, still thinking about the supply nook.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='the hallway is buzzing with wild guesses; one kid says Deshawn from The Volt Squad was spotted by the bike racks at dusk looking guilty; another says a little kid stood at the workshop window after dinner time; a third saw Ms. Finch's cart outside long after dark'>>

choices.label: Press for exactly who was seen and when.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=92 beats='the little kid at the window turns out to be Lulu, the small sister of Nadia's teammate Coral; and Ms. Finch was definitely working late; three names, three question marks, and no time for more because the opening chime rings'>>

choices.label: Head to assembly with three names in mind.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=115 beats='whatever clue Nadia managed to gather before the opening chime, she carries it into the packed gym turning it over and over in her mind; Dean Alvarez announces that three robots were tampered with overnight, that the Brookfield Invention Expo will still happen with demonstrations this afternoon, that teams may use the workshop at lunch for repairs, and that anyone with information should come forward; the room murmurs with rumors, and Nadia starts watching faces instead of listening'>>

choices.label: Watch the crowd while Dean Alvarez talks.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=108 beats='three reactions stand out from the bleachers: Ms. Finch slips out the side door early, twisting his cap in his hands; Deshawn of The Volt Squad stares at his shoes and will not look toward the Sparks; and little Lulu hugs her notebook to her chest like a shield; lunch is the only free time before the demos, so Nadia must pick one thread to pull'>>

choices.label: Catch Deshawn before class.
Find Lulu and ask what she saw.
Follow Ms. Finch.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=102 beats='Deshawn is at his locker cradling a gear pouch, and he goes stiff when Nadia walks up, insisting he never touched her precious Whirligig before she even asks; she can question him straight out right here, hang back and quietly watch what he does next, or go find his teammate Willa, who has never once kept a secret'>>

choices.label: Ask him straight out where he was last night.
Say nothing yet and watch what he does.
Talk to his teammate Willa instead.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=100 beats='the direct question lands like a spark in dry grass; Deshawn goes red and loud, a crowd starts to gather, and a teacher looks over; Nadia feels the moment tipping and knows she can take a breath and start over kindly, or wave Dean Alvarez across and say his name out loud in front of everyone'>>

choices.label: Take a breath and start over, kindly.
Wave Dean Alvarez over and accuse him.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=92 beats='the apology catches Deshawn completely off guard; the red drains out of his face as the crowd loses interest and drifts away, and in a low voice he admits he was at school at dusk last night, but it is not what she thinks'>>

choices.label: Hear him out.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='Nadia trails Deshawn between classes; he keeps checking over his shoulder and carrying a gear pouch as if it were made of eggshells, and at break he heads straight for the Room 12 corridor and hovers outside the workshop window looking miserable'>>

choices.label: Keep following at a distance.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=92 beats='Deshawn tapes a paper bag and a folded note to the workshop door handle and hurries away; the note says sorry in handwriting that has been erased and rewritten twice, and the bag holds the Sparks spare motor that went missing from their bench last week'>>

choices.label: Catch up with Deshawn and ask about the note.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='Willa rolls her eyes the moment Nadia asks; Deshawn has been a nervous wreck all week, she says, ever since he borrowed a spare motor from the Sparks bench without asking and then could not find the courage to hand it back'>>

choices.label: Find Deshawn and tell him what Willa said.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=90 beats='faced gently with Willa's story, Deshawn lets out a breath he seems to have been holding for a week; yes he took the motor, yes he biked back at dusk to return it, and there is one more thing he has been too scared to tell anybody'>>

choices.label: Ask about the one more thing.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=112 beats='however it finally comes out, the story is the same: Deshawn borrowed the motor without asking, panicked, and pedaled back at dusk to return it; while he stood at the locked workshop door he saw a small wobbling light glide across the room inside, low and slow like a lantern on wheels, and he ran, because he knew being seen there made him look guilty; ashamed and relieved at once, he offers the Sparks his own spare servo for Whirligig'>>

choices.label: Ask exactly what the light did.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=96 beats='the light moved bench to bench in patient lines, Deshawn says, never bumping a thing, while the door stayed chained the whole time; whatever took the robots apart was already inside after lockup; the lunch bell rings and the Maker Lab is opening for repairs'>>

choices.label: Get to the Maker Lab and check the back of the room.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=102 beats='the accusation in front of everyone goes exactly as badly as it can; Deshawn is pulled from his team while Dean Alvarez investigates, and it is mid afternoon before a teacher finds the real answer in the workshop, wheel tracks and a dozing old robot and a chewed the routine card, clearing him completely; by then his demo slot is gone; Nadia apologizes for real and he accepts it quietly; Whirligig runs fine, but no ribbon would feel right today, and Nadia learns that a name said out loud without proof cannot be unsaid'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=102 beats='Lulu is behind the gym with red eyes and her notebook clutched tight, far too small to have taken three robots apart but plainly hiding something; Nadia can sit down beside her and talk about drawing first, tell her straight that she knows Lulu was at the workshop window last night, or go and bring her big sister Coral over'>>

choices.label: Sit down beside her and talk about drawing.
Say you know she was at the window last night.
Bring her big sister Coral over.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='Nadia admires the robot drawings page by page, and slowly Lulu stops gripping her notebook so hard; in a very small voice she says she was there last night, and that something was wrong with the shadows inside the workshop'>>

choices.label: Promise she is not in trouble and listen.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=96 beats='the words land much too hard and Lulu bolts around the bleachers like a startled rabbit; Nadia can follow quietly and apologize for scaring her, or let her go and spend what is left of lunch questioning the older kids instead'>>

choices.label: Follow quietly and say sorry.
Let her go and question the older kids.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=92 beats='Nadia finds her wedged behind the gym mats and sits down a little way off, saying sorry for the scare and holding out half a box of pretzels; after a long minute Lulu scoots closer and whispers that she has to tell someone or she will burst'>>

choices.label: Wait until Lulu is ready to talk.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='Coral crouches down, calls her bug, and promises that nobody is mad at anybody; Lulu peeks over the top of her notebook, looks from her sister to Nadia and back, and decides to trust them with what she saw'>>

choices.label: Listen to Lulu's story.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=115 beats='once she feels safe, Lulu tells it all in a rush: she was told she is too little for robotics club, so at dusk she snuck to the workshop to tape a good luck a paper pennant onto Coral's robot; the door was locked, so she watched through the window, and she saw a shadow slide along the shelves all by itself, with two small green lights and a friendly little beep; she ran so fast she dropped a paper pennant, and she is terrified everyone will decide the sabotage was her'>>

choices.label: Ask where the drawing ended up.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=100 beats='they circle to the workshop window and a paper pennant is not on the ground anywhere; if it ended up inside the locked workshop, then whatever moves in there picked it up after lockup; Nadia draws a lookout badge in marker on Lulu's hand, deputizing her on the spot, and they plan to search the back of the workshop the moment lunch repairs begin'>>

choices.label: Head to the Maker Lab at lunch with your new lookout.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=100 beats='without Lulu's clue the lunch hour goes nowhere; the older kids repeat the same three rumors, and repair time runs out with Whirligig only half himself; the demo is a wobbling, sputtering flop, though the crowd claps kindly anyway; only during cleanup does someone open the supply nook, and the real story rolls out on four dusty wheels for everyone to see at once; no prize, no mystery solved by her, and one small girl who still flinches when Nadia walks past; tomorrow, Nadia decides, she starts fixing that with an apology and a box of pretzels'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=102 beats='Ms. Finch stops at the workshop door, tests the padlock twice, mutters that it is not possible, and wheels his cart with a lumpy canvas bundle toward the utility closet; Nadia can knock and ask him straight, peek through the gap where the utility closet door never quite closes, or hang back and study the faint tread lines he keeps frowning at'>>

choices.label: Knock on the utility closet door and ask him.
Peek through the gap in the door.
Study the faint tread lines first.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=94 beats='the door opens a crack and one tired eye looks out; then Ms. Finch sighs like a man setting down something heavy and swings the door wide, saying she had better see for herself before somebody imagines something worse'>>

choices.label: Step inside the utility closet.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=100 beats='through the gap she sees a workbench covered in robot parts, a wheel the size of a dinner plate, and a faded photo of a boxy robot in a bow tie leading a school assembly; then a shadow falls across her and Ms. Finch says it is rude to peek; she can own up and ask about the photo, or slip away and tell her team what she saw'>>

choices.label: Own up and ask about the robot photo.
Slip away and tell the team what you saw.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=92 beats='Nadia owns it, cheeks burning, and asks about the robot in the photo; Ms. Finch's frown turns into something softer, and he says curiosity is not a crime, though sneaking is borderline, and waves her inside'>>

choices.label: Go in and hear him out.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='up close the faint tread lines are not boot prints at all; they are two narrow parallel lines with a zigzag tread between them, wheels, not feet, and every loop begins and ends at the supply nook at the back of the workshop'>>

choices.label: Compare the tread with Ms. Finch's cart wheels.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=92 beats='the cart tread does not match at all; while Nadia is still crouched over the tracks measuring, Ms. Finch comes back for his mop, sees the wheel marks for what they are, and goes gray as ash, whispering oh no, oh Clunker, no'>>

choices.label: Ask him who Clunker is.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=118 beats='the secret comes out gently: Clunker is the school's old demonstration robot, the bow tied machine that led assemblies thirty years ago and has slept in storage ever since; Ms. Finch has spent his nights rebuilding him as a surprise for the fair's fiftieth anniversary; last night he left Clunker charging in the supply nook and locked up as always; his voice fails at the thought of what a half awake Clunker might have done with his old the routine cards, and he says they must go and look, right now'>>

choices.label: Hurry to the Maker Lab with Ms. Finch.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=96 beats='keys jangle as they cut through the lunch crowd, Ms. Finch repeating that Clunker is gentle, he was built gentle; at the Maker Lab his radio crackles about a spill in the cafeteria and he groans, unlocks the room for her, and promises to come back the moment he can'>>

choices.label: Go in and check the supply nook.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=105 beats='the whisper travels faster than any robot: by the end of lunch half the school has heard that Ms. Finch keeps a bench of stolen parts, and a parent is asking pointed questions at the office; the truth rolls out by demo time, an old robot, a garbled the routine card, an anniversary surprise ruined by being told wrong; Ms. Finch is cleared completely, but the surprise he worked nights on is spoiled, and Nadia knows the whisper was hers; she takes the microphone before the demos and sets the story straight, and he nods once from the doorway; the Brookfield Invention Expo goes on, and the lesson stays'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=116 beats='the trail, whichever one Nadia followed, ends at the supply nook at the back of the workshop while lunch repairs clatter behind her; her teammate Owen, already at the Sparks bench laying out tools, spots her heading for the supply nook and jogs over to join her; every clue she is carrying points the same way, at something that was inside this room after lockup; the closet door hangs open a crack, and inside is the charging shelf still faintly warm, dusty wheel tracks rolling out and back, a paper pennant folded neatly on a shelf as if put away with care, and in the dock's card slot the notch card, chewed along one edge'>>

choices.label: Follow the faint tread lines behind the paint tarp.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=120 beats='behind the tarp stands Clunker, the school's boxy old demonstration robot with a faded bow tie, powered down mid chore with a bench brush still gripped in one claw and bins of perfectly sorted parts at his wheels; taped to his side is the maintenance journal in careful adult handwriting, signed R. Ms. Finch, with a clipped photo of Clunker leading a school assembly long ago: anniversary surprise, recharge Tuesday, DO NOT RUN CARD 7; the notch card from the dock is card 7, and its half eaten label reads TIDY ALL BEN; no villain anywhere, just a mixed up machine that woke early and did a thirty year old chore on the wrong benches'>>

choices.label: Decide what to do before the afternoon demos.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=106 beats='one hour until demos and three ways to spend it: use the punch kit and the maintenance journal's code page to fix Clunker's garbled the routine card themselves, go find Ms. Finch and bring the whole truth to Dean Alvarez together, or let sleeping robots lie and pour every minute into repairing the sabotaged robots first'>>

choices.label: Fix Clunker's garbled the routine card yourselves.
Find Ms. Finch and tell Dean Alvarez everything.
Repair the robots first; Clunker can wait.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=98 beats='the charging shelf has a card punch and a drawer of blank cards, and the back page of the maintenance journal is a code table of Clunker's chore words in tidy rows; her teammate Owen cracks his knuckles and grins that they speak robot; between the two of them they can rebuild the routine card, if they pick the right way to do it'>>

choices.label: Work out the safest way to fix the routine card.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=102 beats='two ways stare back at them: punch a brand new card letter by letter against the code table, slow but sure, or flip the TEACH dial on Clunker's side and reteach the chore by hand, which the maintenance journal says is faster but warns, in double underline, never to do while a garbled card is loaded'>>

choices.label: Punch a fresh card, carefully.
Flip the TEACH dial and reteach him by hand.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=100 beats='punch, check, punch, check; the new card reads HELP ALL TEAMS and slides home with a satisfying click; Clunker hums awake with soft green eyes, reads the card, and begins wheeling bench to bench, handing every sorted part back to exactly the right robot like a nurse in a surgery'>>

choices.label: Put Clunker to work and rebuild Whirligig.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=96 beats='with Clunker handing out parts the repairs fly, and the other two teams stop staring and start cheering; Whirligig comes back together with minutes to spare; they leave a thank you note on Ms. Finch's cart and walk Clunker along to the auditorium themselves, so nothing surprises anybody ever again'>>

choices.label: Roll everything to the auditorium.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=104 beats='the TEACH dial is a mistake; Clunker wakes mid garble, chirps TIDY, picks up a mop, and trundles for the gym doors at exactly the speed of trouble; her teammate Owen flips the maintenance journal open to a page about an end of chores whistle while Nadia eyes the power clip on Clunker's back, safe and sudden but sure to eat the repair hour'>>

choices.label: Yank the power clip, safe and sudden.
Whistle the end of chores signal from the maintenance journal.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='two sharp notes and one low; Clunker stops mid roll, spins in place, and comes back looking as sheepish as a refrigerator can look; the chase has eaten most of the repair hour, so Whirligig goes back together in a scramble and they wheel Clunker along to the auditorium rather than leave him alone'>>

choices.label: Sprint the last repairs and get to the auditorium.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=98 beats='the power clip clicks and Clunker sags mid stride, safe, still, and finally harmless; but hauling him home and calming everyone down eats the whole repair hour, and the Sparks miss their slot; Dean Alvarez lets them demonstrate at the very end of the day, after the trophies, to a small crowd of stragglers and parents, and patched up Whirligig runs his routine clean; no ribbon, but the truth gets told, Clunker is promised a proper debut next year, and nothing was broken today that cannot be mended'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=100 beats='they find Ms. Finch and show him the maintenance journal and the chewed card; he sits down slowly on an upturned bucket, looks at Clunker's neat bins for a long moment, and says that not meaning to is not the same as not doing; then he stands, straightens his cap, and walks with them straight to Dean Alvarez's office'>>

choices.label: Go with him to Dean Alvarez.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=108 beats='Dean Alvarez listens to the whole tangled story without interrupting once, then surprises everyone by turning to Nadia: you found the truth, so what should happen now; Nadia could ask to push the demos back an hour so all three sabotaged teams can repair fairly, ask that Clunker's story be told at the Brookfield Invention Expo itself, or suggest keeping the whole thing quiet to spare Ms. Finch'>>

choices.label: Ask to push the demos back an hour for fair repairs.
Ask that Clunker's story be told at the Brookfield Invention Expo.
Suggest keeping it quiet to spare Ms. Finch.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=96 beats='the announcement crackles through the halls, demos pushed back an hour for technical difficulties overcome by student investigators; the workshop becomes one big pit crew, with Ms. Finch and a freshly re carded Clunker handing back parts, and when the hour is up Clunker rides to the auditorium at the head of the parade'>>

choices.label: Take the extra hour, then head to the auditorium.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=96 beats='Dean Alvarez's eyes crinkle; fifty years of this school, she says, and the anniversary surprise turns out to be a mystery solved by students, that is a story worth telling when the moment is right; she leaves the telling of it in Nadia's hands, sends them off to repair, and has Clunker wheeled to the auditorium so the Brookfield Invention Expo can meet him properly'>>

choices.label: Get Whirligig ready while the stage is set.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=100 beats='Ms. Finch shakes his head slowly and almost smiles; secrets grew this mess, little engineer, he says; but he asks what she would really do, and Dean Alvarez waits too; Nadia can hold her ground that nobody else needs to know, or agree that the truth should be told, kindly and in the right words'>>

choices.label: Hold your ground: nobody else needs to know.
Agree the truth should be told, kindly.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=94 beats='told kindly, it is a different story altogether: not custodian's robot wrecks fair, but the school's oldest robot got his chores mixed up and three teams got a wild morning; everyone in the office breathes easier, Ms. Finch thanks her for the right words in the right order and goes to fetch Clunker so there are no more surprises, while Nadia and the team race back to the workshop and rebuild Whirligig from the neatly sorted bins'>>

choices.label: Head for the auditorium.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=96 beats='the secret holds for exactly one hour; when applause rolls through the gym wall, Clunker answers it from his closet with his old assembly fanfare, muffled but unmistakable, and the truth beeps its way out in the messiest possible way; there is a scramble, some blushing, and a lot of explaining mid fair; no harm is done and the demos go on, but Nadia watches Ms. Finch apologize in front of everyone anyway, and understands that a kept secret is just a surprise with worse timing'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=100 beats='robots first: and the strange truth is that Clunker's sorting makes rebuilding faster, every screw already grouped by size, every wire coiled; but three teams were hit and only one of them is hers; Nadia can call The Volt Squad and the Wrenches over to share the bins and rebuild together, or fix Whirligig first, because the Brookfield Invention Expo will not wait'>>

choices.label: Call the other teams over to share the bins.
Fix Whirligig first; the Brookfield Invention Expo will not wait.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=100 beats='three teams crowd one bench line and the parts flow like a bucket brigade; grudges evaporate somewhere between the third screwdriver swap and the first shared joke; when someone finds the maintenance journal everybody agrees to fetch Ms. Finch, who arrives mortified and then, seeing three robots nearly whole, rolls up his sleeves'>>

choices.label: Finish the last bolts together.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=92 beats='three patched robots stand ready and one strange story travels the workshop in delighted whispers; Ms. Finch insists on wheeling Clunker along to the fair himself so the old fellow is never out of sight again, and the gym doors are opening; whatever the judges decide, the morning's disaster has turned into the best lunch hour of the year'>>

choices.label: Roll to the auditorium together.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=100 beats='Whirligig is whole again with twenty minutes to spare, but one bench over Sparky is still in pieces and Deshawn's team is losing its race against the clock; and behind the closet door Clunker has begun to hum as his charge tops off; Nadia can run for Ms. Finch and hand the humming closet to a grown up, or head for the auditorium, since she fixed what is hers'>>

choices.label: Run for Ms. Finch and hand Clunker over.
Head for the auditorium; you fixed what is yours.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=94 beats='Ms. Finch arrives at a jog, listens, and goes pale and grateful in the same breath; he murmurs an apology to the whole room, promises the rest of the story after the demos, and walks Clunker to the auditorium himself; Nadia slides through the doors just as The Gadget Squad is called'>>

choices.label: Take your place at the start line.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=completion words=102 beats='Whirligig runs a clean routine and takes a ribbon, and it starts feeling heavy the moment the judge hands it over; across the gym Sparky never made the start line, and Deshawn's team packs their pieces into a box without looking at anybody; Clunker's humming closet got handed to a startled teacher at the last minute and sorted out safely, so no harm came of it, but Nadia keeps looking at the empty start line; after the fair she carries her toolbox to The Volt Squad's bench and offers to help rebuild, because a ribbon should not weigh this much'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=118 beats='however the last hour was spent, demo time arrives the way it always does, all at once; the auditorium is packed, the judges click their pens, and Whirligig waits at the start line, patched, blinking, and ready enough; off at the edge of the floor old Clunker sits safe and still with his bow tie straightened, drawing curious looks, the day's whole mystery answered at last; Nadia's team gathers around her, and her heart hammers in the good way for the first time since breakfast'>>

choices.label: Step up when The Gadget Squad is called.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=106 beats='the microphone for the thirty second team introduction is in Nadia's hand and the auditorium goes quiet; Whirligig is ready on the line and Clunker's soft green eyes are watching from the side; she can run the routine exactly as rehearsed, invite the old robot into the demonstration itself, or spend her introduction telling the whole true story of the tidy saboteur'>>

choices.label: Run the routine exactly as rehearsed.
Invite Clunker into the demonstration.
Tell the whole true story of the tidy saboteur.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=climax words=110 beats='the rehearsed run: Whirligig hums through the gates, threads the slalom, and hits the seesaw ramp, where his patched wheel starts to wobble hard; Nadia has one heartbeat to decide: trust the practice and let him ride it out, stop the run and fix the wheel right there in front of everyone while narrating like a pit crew, or grab the remote and steer around the ramp to a safer finish'>>

choices.label: Trust the practice and let Whirligig ride it out.
Stop and do a live repair, narrating every step.
Steer around the ramp and take the safe finish.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=climax words=110 beats='Nadia beckons, and Clunker rolls onto the floor to a gasp that turns into applause, the oldest robot at the fair reporting for duty; three ways to share the spotlight: run the routine as a duet with Clunker handing Whirligig the payload, step back and let Clunker perform his thirty year old assembly routine first, or hand Clunker the streamer popper and make him the grand finale'>>

choices.label: Run the routine as a duet with Clunker.
Let Clunker perform his old routine first.
Hand Clunker the streamer popper for the finale.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=climax words=108 beats='she tells it all in her thirty seconds: the sorted screws and the stencil labels, the locked door and the wheel tracks, Ms. Finch's secret anniversary surprise, and the chewed card that turned a gentle helper into a mystery; the auditorium is silent, then roaring; the judges lean in, and Nadia has one breath left to decide how the story ends: dedicate the demo to Ms. Finch and Clunker, or call the other two sabotaged teams onto the floor to run side by side'>>

choices.label: Dedicate the demo to Ms. Finch and Clunker.
Call all three sabotaged teams up to demo together.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=completion words=100 beats='Nadia keeps her thumbs off the controls and her heart in her throat; the patched wheel shudders, bites, and holds, and Whirligig sails off the ramp to the loudest cheer of the afternoon; The Gadget Squad takes second place overall, plus the mentors' ingenuity medal for a robot rebuilt from a bin of sorted parts in a single day; Ms. Finch claps loudest of all, Clunker flashes his lights in something like pride, and Nadia decides that second place earned this way beats first place any other way'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=100 beats='Nadia calls the stop herself, flips Whirligig gently on his side, and narrates the wobbly wheel fix bolt by bolt like a surgeon teaching a class; the auditorium is dead silent, then thunderous; the run scores no course points, but the judges invent a Quick Thinker prize on the spot, because, as the head judge says, this is exactly what the fair is supposed to be about; Whirligig finishes the course on a rock steady wheel, and half the little kids in the gym go home wanting a toolbox of their own'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=96 beats='the swerve is smooth and safe and costs every obstacle point the ramp was worth; Whirligig crosses the finish upright to warm applause and a scoreboard that lands The Gadget Squad squarely in the middle; no ribbon this year, but nothing crashed, nobody got blamed for anything they did not do, and the whole strange day still counts as solved; on the way out her teammate Owen says next year they build a wheel that cannot wobble, and Nadia is already sketching it in her head'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=102 beats='nobody at the fair has ever seen anything like it: Whirligig zipping the course while Clunker, thirty years his elder, hands off the payload with a courtly little bow of his claw; the crowd is on its feet before the finish line; the judges hand The Gadget Squad the crowd favorite ribbon, Dean Alvarez declares Clunker the expo's guest of honor, and Ms. Finch polishes Clunker's bow tie with his sleeve about eleven times; the sabotage, everyone agrees on the way home, turned into the best fair in fifty years'>>

ending.title: The Oldest Robot at the Fair

nodes.body: <<FILL role=completion words=98 beats='Clunker takes the floor and runs his old assembly routine, stiff, earnest, and completely charming, ending with the expo anthem in warbly chimes that gets three hundred people singing along; it eats most of The Gadget Squad's slot, and Whirligig's shortened run scores no prize; and yet, watching Ms. Finch mouth every word of the expo anthem from the doorway, Nadia cannot call it a loss; some demonstrations are worth more than trophies, and this one was thirty years late'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=100 beats='the streamer popper fires and Clunker's oldest instinct kicks in: TIDY; he wheels through the falling streamers, catching them midair and filing them neatly into his chest bin while the auditorium howls with laughter; the routine is a shambles, the judges dock every point they can find, and absolutely nobody who was there will ever forget it; no prize goes home with The Gadget Squad, but the video is legendary by dinnertime, and Clunker is officially invited back next year, cannon and all'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=100 beats='Nadia dedicates the run to the two quietest members of the team, Ms. Finch who spent his nights rebuilding a piece of the school's heart, and Clunker who only ever meant to help; Ms. Finch is called to the floor blinking hard, and Clunker leads the auditorium in the expo anthem as if no time has passed at all; the demo runs clean, the anniversary surprise is saved after all, and when the fair closes, the fiftieth year photo on the wall shows a girl, a robot, and a very straight bow tie'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=102 beats='all three sabotaged teams take the floor at once and run their demos side by side, sharing the course, the ramps, and one slightly overworked stopwatch; the judges give up trying to score it separately and award a joint champion trophy for the day the fair became a team; Deshawn shakes Nadia's hand without being told to, the Wrenches hoist Nutmeg like a trophy, and over the loudspeaker Dean Alvarez says that anyone who solves a mystery this kindly can call the fair theirs'>>
